name: nxuskit
description: Accelerate nxusKit integrations for LLMs, reasoning, hybrid AI workflows, CLI/Bash prototypes, and public-safe local intelligence patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Accelerate nxusKit integrations for LLMs, reasoning, hybrid AI, CLI/Bash prototypes, and public-safe local intelligence workflows.
interface.longDescription: nxusKit Celerat is a Codex Plugin for implementation acceleration. The v0.9.4 release includes a local read-only MCP server (Python stdio, requires Python 3.11+) that lets Codex discover canonical nxusKit examples and CLI/Bash recipes from a bundled offline metadata snapshot. Skills cover provider-agnostic LLM integration (streaming, structured output, tool calling, vision), CLIPS rules, Bayesian inference, Z3-backed solving, ZEN decision tables, hybrid AI patterns, source-packet workflows, and public-safe regulated-data boundaries. Community-first; Pro disclosure before any Pro-only code.
defaultPrompt: Find the smallest nxusKit example or recipe for this repo with setup, smoke steps, and CE/Pro tier.
Use common-sense-guardrails to add Community CLIPS checks around an LLM recommendation workflow.
Use model-research-harness to compare model/provider fitness with dry-run scoring before live calls.
